sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 26

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 26:1
items.html: (to the question) For there is a great difference between the GAR and the ZAT [the seven lower ones] already from their root in Nekudim. The three first Partzufim — their whole discernment of Katnut [smallness] was completed and emerged from the discernment of the Lights of the Nikvey Eynaim [apertures of the eyes], that is, from the Masach [screen] of SAG. But the ZAT of Nekudim received from there only a slight illumination, and the essence of their existence in the discernment of Katnut emerged from the secret of the Vav and Nekuda [point], with which the Yesod of AK [Adam Kadmon] illuminated to the Yesodot of AVI [Aba ve Ima] of Nekudim. Their Gadlut, however, emerged there through the Zivug [coupling] of AVI, who coupled upon the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the Vav and Nekuda that they had received from the Yesod of AK, and begot all the Gadlut of these ZAT, as is known. Thus the ZON of Nekudim, too, emerged through the partnership of three Partzufim: from the NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod] of the inner AK, and from AVI. Therefore in the world of Atzilut as well, whose essence is from the discernment of the Masach of Nekudim that was refined and rose to the Metzach [forehead], this sufficed for the unfolding of the three first Partzufim, up to AVI. But ZON could not come from the unfolding of this Masach of Nekudim, for it is drawn only from the discernments of the NHY of AK, which are the discernments of the Reshimot [records] of MA and BON of the inner AK; hence in Atzilut too, the essence of his existence must emerge from the NHY of the inner Partzuf of Atzilut, which is the NHY of AA [Arich Anpin]. But since no Partzuf can receive anything from its upper-upper, they therefore also need the partnership of AVI, so that they will convey to him the Mochin from AA. Hence ZA of Atzilut necessarily required three partners — which the three first Partzufim of Atzilut did not need at all. (Item 7)
